Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First the task is to produce a BPMN like process diagram description in textual form

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: It should include identifying diagram components components include activities tasks sequence flow gateways decision points roles participants and artifacts

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Activities tasks represent the main steps or work in the process sequence flow shows the order and direction of process activities

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Gateways decision points handle process branching or merging roles participants define who performs the activities adding clarity to responsibilities artifacts provide additional information like documents or data supporting the process

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Inputs and outputs define what data enters and leaves each process step ensuring clarity in the flow exceptions and variations like missing purchase orders are critical to handle within the process for robustness

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The process begins when an invoice arrives typically via email triggering the initial activity

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Key roles include the Accounts Payable Clerk Purchasing Officer Department Manager Accounts Payable Supervisor and Supplier Relationship Manager each with specific responsibilities
